name: Spicy Szechuan Tofu
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tbsp Cornstarch dissolved in 2 tbsp water
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain and rinse the tofu. Drain again.
2. Cut into 1-inch square pieces.
3. Heat a wok over high flame and add oil when hot.
4. Add ginger, garlic, and 2 tbsp scallions; cook for 30 seconds.
5. Add hot bean paste and tofu to the wok; stir gently.
6. Add tamari, salt, sugar, and stock. Bring to a full boil.
7. Thicken with cornstarch mixture (cornstarch dissolved in 2 tbsp water).
8. Stir in sesame oil, chili oil, and Szechuan peppercorn powder.
9. Sprinkle remaining scallions over the dish and serve with brown rice.
